failures.description: The required catalog dependency timed out, preventing the agent from retrieving the product price needed to answer the user.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At step 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch tool call with the correct item_id and product_id. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating the dependency timed out after 30000ms. The invocation itself was well-formed, and there is no evidence of schema, validation, access, or guardrail failure. The timeout was not resolved later; subsequent steps only reported inability to complete.
